title: FCC Banned Foreign-made Consumer Routers Over Security Risks

rules.sigma:
title: CDB APEX v37.0 — FCC Banned Foreign-made Consumer Routers Over Security Risks
status: experimental
author: CyberDudeBivash SENTINEL APEX
date: 2026/03/27
logsource:
    category: firewall
detection:
    selection_dns:
        query:
            - '*fcc.gov*'
    condition: selection_dns
level: high
